---
title: "Murchiona"
author: "Cenaida Largo"
format: html
editor: visual
---

# Set up

```{r}
#| label: setup-packages
#| warning: false
#| message: false
library(here)     # working directory
library(readr)    # read CSV
library(dplyr)    # data manipulation
library(leaflet)  # map visualization
library(ggplot2)  # data visualization
library(stringr)  # text manipulation
```

# Data import

```{r}
#| label: datasets
#| message: false
taxonomy <- read_csv("data/VERS2022_taxonomy.csv")
assemblages <- read_csv("data/VERS2022_assemblages.csv")
stations <- read_csv("data/VERS2022_stations.csv")
```

# Taxa

Taxa code extraction from the taxonomy file.

```{r}
#| label: column-name cleanup
taxonomy <- taxonomy %>%
  setNames(as.character(.[2, ])) %>%
  slice(-2)
```

```{r}
#| label: Murchieona muldali
MUR_MUR <- taxonomy %>%
  filter(revised_name == "Murchieona muldali") %>%
  select(
    abbreviated_revised_name,
    revised_name,
    full_revised_name,
    justification_name_revision
  )
```

```{r}
#| label: Murchieona minuscula
MUR_MIN <- taxonomy %>%
  filter(revised_name == "Murchieona minuscula") %>%
  select(
    abbreviated_revised_name,
    revised_name,
    full_revised_name,
    justification_name_revision
  )
```

```{r}
#| label: taxon-code
MUR_MUR_cod <- unique(MUR_MUR$abbreviated_revised_name)
MUR_MIN_cod <- unique(MUR_MIN$abbreviated_revised_name)
```

# Distribution

Occurrences extraction from the assemblages file and get coordinates from the stations file.

```{r}
#| label: MUR_MUR_distribution
MUR_MUR_occ <- assemblages %>% 
  filter(abbreviated_revised_name == MUR_MUR_cod) %>% 
  select(id_station,
         source,
         abbreviated_revised_name,
         development_stage) %>% 
    left_join(
    stations %>% 
      select(id_station,
             source,
             latitude_wgs84,
             longitude_wgs84,
             day,
             month,
             corine_land_cover,
             corine_land_cover_particularity,
             geology),
    by = c("id_station", "source")
    )
```

```{r}
#| label: MUR_MIN_distribution
MUR_MIN_occ <- assemblages %>% 
  filter(abbreviated_revised_name == MUR_MIN_cod) %>% 
  select(id_station,
         source,
         abbreviated_revised_name,
         development_stage) %>% 
    left_join(
    stations %>% 
      select(id_station,
             source,
             latitude_wgs84,
             longitude_wgs84,
             day,
             month,
             corine_land_cover,
             corine_land_cover_particularity,
             geology),
    by = c("id_station", "source")
    )
```

```{r}
#| label: MUR_MUR_map
leaflet(MUR_MUR_occ) %>%
  addTiles() %>%
  addCircleMarkers(
    lng = ~longitude_wgs84,
    lat = ~latitude_wgs84,
    popup = ~id_station,
    radius = 5,
    color = "red"
  )
```

```{r}
#| label: MUR_MIN_map
leaflet(MUR_MIN_occ) %>%
  addTiles() %>%
  addCircleMarkers(
    lng = ~longitude_wgs84,
    lat = ~latitude_wgs84,
    popup = ~id_station,
    radius = 5,
    color = "blue"
  )
```

```{r}
#| label: combined_map
leaflet() %>%
  addTiles() %>%
  addCircleMarkers(
    data = MUR_MIN_occ,
    lng = ~longitude_wgs84,
    lat = ~latitude_wgs84,
    popup = ~id_station,
    radius = 5,
    color = "blue"
  ) %>%
  addCircleMarkers(
    data = MUR_MUR_occ,
    lng = ~longitude_wgs84,
    lat = ~latitude_wgs84,
    popup = ~id_station,
    radius = 5,
    color = "red"
  )
```

# Phenology

Records of *M. muldali* by month.

```{r}
MUR_MUR_occ$month_name <- factor(
  month.abb[MUR_MUR_occ$month],
  levels = month.abb
)
```

```{r}
ggplot(MUR_MUR_occ, aes(x = month_name)) +
  geom_bar() +
  labs(
    title = paste("Monthly observations of", MUR_MUR_cod),
    x = "Month",
    y = "Number of observations"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

Development stages of *M. muldali* by month.

```{r}
ggplot(MUR_MUR_occ, aes(x = month_name, fill = development_stage)) +
  geom_bar(position = "dodge") +
  labs(
    title = paste("Monthly observations of", MUR_MUR_cod),
    x = "Month",
    y = "Number of observations",
    fill = "Development stage"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

Joining adults and subadults.

```{r}
MUR_MUR_occ <- MUR_MUR_occ %>%
  mutate(
    stage_group = case_when(
      development_stage %in% c("adult", "subadult") ~ "adult/subadult",
      TRUE ~ as.character(development_stage)
    )
  )
```

```{r}
ggplot(MUR_MUR_occ, aes(x = month_name, fill = stage_group)) +
  geom_bar(position = "dodge") +
  labs(
    title = paste("Monthly observations of", MUR_MUR_cod),
    x = "Month",
    y = "Number of observations",
    fill = "Development stage"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
